issue: storeApplyScenePlan retries on ANY saveDocument error; a non-stale-rev error (network, constraint, wrong scope) causes double-apply on the retry
action: gate retry on isStaleRevError(err) — only retry when error message matches 'stale rev'/'Stale revision'; rethrow immediately otherwise
verification: add test where saveDocument throws a non-stale error; assert no second saveDocument call and no recordDecision call

issue: instantiate_template appends apply_data after duplicate_page ops; collectSlots on combined document (source + copies) throws 'duplicate slot name' for any template with named slots
action: restructure: call pure instantiateTemplate() helper from templates.ts which handles id re-mint + binding in isolation, then persist the result; OR strip slot from source pages before apply_data runs on combined doc
verification: add mcp-handler test: source page has text element with slot='title'; call instantiate_template with bindings={title:'Hello'}; assert isError=false and new page's element.text === 'Hello'

issue: catch block in storeApplyScenePlan swallows error type; same as HIGH finding — addressed together

add_text (and add_image:362, add_shape:442, add_video:485, add_page:679, duplicate_page:709) call env.mintId() once for the element id and pass env.mintId again to applyPlan; counter-based implementations waste one id per call
action: make mintId param optional in applyPlan or pass a no-op factory when the tool already minted the id; restructure to not consume an extra token
verification: verify counter-based test in mcp-handler.test.ts produces id-1 for the first element, id-2 for the decision — no gaps

issue: set_page_guides silently coerces non-array vertical/horizontal to [] instead of surfacing a type error to the model
action: throw a descriptive error when the arg is provided but is not an array; match the type-checking pattern of other arg readers
verification: add mcp-handler test where vertical is passed as number 500; assert isError=true and document guides unchanged

issue: optionalString called twice per slot field in add_text, add_image, add_video — redundant computation and misleading pattern
action: capture result once: const slotVal = optionalString(args, 'slot'); ...(slotVal ? { slot: slotVal } : {})
verification: no behavioral change; existing tests pass

issue: dead variable postGroupDocument assigned in groupElementsCommand.execute but never read
action: remove the variable declaration and its assignment in execute
verification: TypeScript compile succeeds; no test changes needed

issue: requireDoc helper defined but never called; all command paths use applyOp/applyOps directly which access state.document unconditionally
action: remove requireDoc or use it consistently — pick one defensive pattern

issue: same as MEDIUM optionalString finding — also affects add_image:360 and add_video:483
